title: Release Gates, Migration, Canary, Kill Switch, Recovery, and Defense · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent organization supplies a different user population, task distribution, tool set, risk tier, model response, resource budget, accessibility need, and failure condition and transfers release gates, migration, canary, kill switch, recovery, and defense into a changed production agent release and residual-risk defense. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of production agent release and residual-risk defense with automated and judgment evidence. Learners pr…
objectives: Require schema, unit, trajectory, safety, privacy, accessibility, compatibility, load, cost, deployment, migration, rollback, recovery, and review evidence before release.
Diff model, API, SDK, ADK, schema, safety, tool, token, state, and deprecation behavior against versioned fixtures and representative evals.
Canary immutable candidates against task, safety, tool, refusal, latency, cost, and user signals with predeclared abort and state-aware rollback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Agent Release Gates
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab agent engineering team handles case 3868 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to defend model and SDK migration, evaluation, security, approvals, capacity, canary, rollback, kill switch, recovery, support, and residual risk; model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Production Defense
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-production-defense-1vso44" that uses case 2552 to defend model and SDK migration, evaluation, security, approvals, capacity, canary, rollback, kill switch, recovery, support, and residual risk. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Production Defense.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Production Defense into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Production Defense, keep Production Defense connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-production-defense-1vso44
# Competency: agentpy-production-defense.
# Case 2552: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_production_defense_1vso44(release_gates: int = 18, passed_gates: int = 18, rehearsed_incidents: int = 10, open_critical_findings: int = 0, kill_switch_seconds: int = 20) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1vso44 = "1vso44-44osv1-2552"
    assert evidence_variant_1vso44
    evidence_axes_1vso44 = (
        "authority1vso44",
        "interaction2552",
        "tool44osv1",
        "state1vso442552",
        "evaluation25521vso44",
        "recovery44osv12552",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1vso44)) == 6
    if release_gates < 14 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-release-gate"
    if rehearsed_incidents < 8 or open_critical_findings > 0:
        return False, open_critical_findings, "incident-readiness"
    if kill_switch_seconds < 0 or kill_switch_seconds > 60:
        return False, kill_switch_seconds, "kill-switch-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates and open_critical_findings == 0
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-agent-production"
